creator: _jkrow
caption: The Drake might shake you, but Antarctica will change you. 👏🎥 @_jkrow, T+L contributor. #traveltips #drakepassage #anarctica

transcription.text: is crossing the drake passage really worth it to get to antarctica? they say you have to earn your trip to antarctica because before you can get there you have to cross the infamous drake passage. it's a 600 mile stretch of open sea where the atlantic and pacific oceans meet and when they do things can get pretty rough. the drake crossing takes about two days by ship from ushuaia argentina and you either get smooth sailing on the calm drake lake or you get the drake shake with up to 30 foot swells and water crashing over the bow. either way though the ships are well equipped to handle rough seas. some ships have stabilizers which make things easier and you'll also have ropes in the hallways, seasick bags around every corner, chairs tethered to the floor, and a 24 hour buffet of ginger chews and seasick meds. if you get really sick it's easier to just stay in bed but there's also a lot to keep you busy like lectures on wildlife and activities while you eat. and on the other side of the crossing is a place unlike anywhere else on the planet. you'll sail through glacial fjords with crystal clear water, walk with thousands of penguins, watch seals nabbing on icebergs, and see landscapes that just don't exist anywhere else on earth. so is braving the drake passage worth it? i heard a fellow passenger say it best. the drake might shake you but antarctica will change you and that alone is worth the trip.
